title: diplazium subscabrum
intro: Diplazium subscabrum, also known as the Himalayan polypody, is a species of fern native to the Himalayan region and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, which help to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Diplazium subscabrum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed for its medicinal properties, or used topically as a paste or poultice to treat skin conditions.
